title: cyclobalanus celebica
intro: Cyclobalanus celebica is a species of flowering plant in the family Fagaceae, commonly known as the Celebica oak, native to Indonesia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Cyclobalanus celebica include its ability to help lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which are used to support cardiovascular health and reduce oxidative stress.
